title: Ruling Council (disambiguation)
content:
There were several '''Ruling Councils''' in the [[Timeline of galactic history|history]] of [[the galaxy]].

==[[Canon]]==
*'''[[Imperial Future Council]]'''— a group of high ranking [[Imperial Military]] officials who met on [[Akiva]] to discuss the future of the fragmenting [[Galactic Empire]].
*'''[[Imperial Ruling Council]]'''— a collective of bureaucrats consisting of [[Galactic Emperor]] [[Darth Sidious|Palpatine's]] closest [[Emperor's adviser|Imperial advisors]].
*'''[[Shadow Council]]'''— a secret advisory council led by [[Counselor to the Empire]] [[Fleet Admiral]] [[Gallius Rax]] to govern the loyalist Imperial forces towards the end of the [[Galactic Civil War]].
*'''[[Shadow Council (Imperial Remnants)]]'''– another secret advisory council led by the [[Imperial Remnants]] forces during the [[New Republic Era]].
*'''[[Ruling Council (Kamino)]]'''— the council that consisted of the [[Kaminoan]] government.
*'''[[Mandalorian Government Council]]'''— also known as the '''Ruling Council''', it was a council of [[minister]]s that advised the [[New Mandalorians|New Mandalorian]] [[Duchess]] [[Satine Kryze]] until its dissolvement.
*'''[[Ruling Council (Skako Minor)]]'''

==[[Star Wars Legends|Legends]]==
*'''[[Ruling Circle|Chiss Ruling Circle]]'''
*'''[[Grand Hutt Council/Legends|Hutt Ruling Council]]'''
*'''[[Imperial Ruling Council/Legends|Imperial Ruling Council]]'''
*'''[[New Republic Ruling Council]]'''
*'''[[Ruling council (Exocron)]]'''
*'''[[Ruling Council (Kamino)/Legends|Ruling Council (Kamino)]]
*'''[[Ruling Council (New Mandalorians)/Legends|Ruling Council (New Mandalorians)]]'''
